name: Zucchini Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pizza toppings: mushrooms, Mozzarella, etc.
2. Grate zucchini and sprinkle with salt. Let stand for 30 minutes.
3. Squeeze out water from the grated zucchini.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Grease a 9x13 inch pan.
6. Combine grated zucchini, eggs, flour, Parmesan cheese, oregano, and a few grinds of pepper in a bowl.
7. Spread the mixture evenly onto the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until firm and dry.
9. Brush with olive oil and broil until lightly browned.
10. Spread tomato sauce over the pizza base.
11. Add mushrooms and Mozzarella cheese on top.
12. Broil again until the Mozzarella is melted and bubbly.
